pass_vectors.condition: A TSX or CSS edit under apps/web updates the isolated preview through Next Fast Refresh without running next build.
The preview imports AgentSurface and EmployeeUiPortHost from production source rather than a parallel mock renderer.
Workbench chrome is outside a same-origin iframe and preview viewport dimensions are controlled independently.
A valid draft creates exactly one new vNNNN JSON file atomically and never overwrites an existing version.
Dirty worktrees may save drafts but the preset is marked reproducible=false with changed paths.
Promotion rejects a dirty worktree and an invalid or non-existent source preset.
An approved preset can be assigned to multiple profile keys and the generated runtime registry resolves deterministically.
Repository writes require development mode, fixture mode, explicit write enablement, loopback host, same-origin request, valid slug, and a path under ui-lab/presets.
UI Lab remains unavailable and write-disabled in normal production-like environments.
Every approved preset renders without horizontal overflow at desktop, tablet, and mobile review widths.
Workbench controls have stable accessible names, keyboard operation, visible focus, and reduced-motion-safe transitions.
Every executable UI path, preset lifecycle command, validation script, and evidence boundary is reachable from the UI agent onboarding document.

fail_vectors.failure: UI Lab implements or preserves a parallel fake renderer that diverges from production components.
The documented normal iteration command invokes next build after each edit.
Named versions exist only in browser storage or query parameters.
A dirty or uncommitted design can be assigned as approved.
Saving a version mutates or overwrites an earlier vNNNN file.
Client input controls an arbitrary repository path or writes non-JSON source.
Preset writes are reachable in production, staging, or non-loopback development.
Assignments and generated runtime registry disagree.
A screenshot is treated as proof of interactions, runtime correctness, or production acceptance.
CI attempts the full Cartesian product of every strategy on every change.
fail_vectors.response: replace with adapter smoke + approved-preset matrix + pairwise exploration
